title: Helmet notification 2018
text: F. No. RT-1 10121 07 I 201 2-MVL Government of lndia Ministry of Road Transport and Highways (MVL Section) Transport Bhawan, 1, Partiament Street, New Dethi-110001 _, Dated theA"August, 201 8 Subject:- Notification for bringing Protective Helmets for two wheelers rider under compulsory certification under Bureau of lndian Standards Act, 2016. Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, in consuttation of Bureau of lndian Standards proposes to issue Helmets (Quatity Control) Order, 2018 under the powers conferred under section 16, 17 &.25 of the Bureau of lndian Standards Act, 2016. 2. As per the procedure taid down by the Department of Consumer Affairs vide O.M. I.lo.6/5/2017-BlS (Pt.) dated 20.03.2018, the proposed Hetmets (Quatity Controt) Order, 2018 is hereby pubtished inviting comments from the general pubtic and the stakehotders for a period of sixty (60) days. 3. The comments or suggestions if any, may be sent to Joint Secretary (Transport), Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, Transport Bhawan, Partiament Street, New Dethi- 110001 or email at t!:Q!@gqvJ_0. 0d- labt(fDamtey Joint Secretary (Transport) Ministry of Road Transport and Highways -- 1 of 5 -- ITO BE PUBLISHED lN THE GAZETTE OF lNDlA, EXTRAORDINARY, Part ll, SECTION 3, suB sECTroN (ii)I GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS Draft Notification New Dethi, Dated August, 2018 5.0 _ (E). - ln exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (2) of section 16 read with section '17 and sub-section 3 of section 25 of the Bureau of lndia Standards Act, 2016 (11 of 2016), the Centrat Government, after consulting the Bureau of lndia Standards, is of the opinion that it is necessary or expedient so to do in the pubic interest, hereby make the following order, namety:- 1. Short title and commencement.- (1) This Order may be called the He[mets (Quatity Controt) Order, 2018. (2) lt shatt come into force with effect from the date..... 2. Compulsory use of Standards Mark.- Goods and articles specified in cotumn (1) of the Tabte shat[ conform to the corresponding lndian Standard given in cotumn (2) of the Table and shatt bear the Standard Mark under a license from the Bureau of lndian Standards as per Scheme-l of Schedute-ll of BIS (Conformity Assessment) Regulations 2018. Provided that nothing in this Order shatt appty in retation to goods and artictes as specified in the cotumn (1) of the Table meant for export, which conform to any specification required by the foreign buyer. 3. Certification and Enforcement Authority.- ln respect of the goods and articles specified in the cotumn (1) of the Tabte, the Bureau of lndian Standards shatt be the certifying and enforcing authority. ln addition, an officer not betow the rank of General Manager, District lndustries Center in Department of lndustries of the State Government shatt atso be the enforcing authority. -- 2 of 5 -- 1.'' ) penatty for Contravention. - Any person who contravenes the provision of this Order shal.t be punishabte under the provisions of the Bureau of lndia Standards Act, 2016. Table Goods and articles lndian Standard Titte of lndian Standard (1) (2) (3) Hetmets for two wheeter riders lS 4151 : 2015 Protective Hetmet for Two Wheeter Riders Note: The tatest version of lndian Standards inctuding the amendments issued thereof, as pubtished and notified by the Bureau from time to time, shat[ be appticabte from the date as notified bY the Bureau.
